description: A USD prim — a named container in the scene hierarchy that can have typed schemas, properties, metadata, and composition arcs applied to it.

path.description: The absolute scene path to this prim.

name.description: The name component of the prim path.

typeName.description: The typed schema name applied to this prim.

specifier.description: How this prim is introduced into the scene.

active.description: Whether this prim is active (inactive prims are excluded from rendering).

hidden.description: Whether this prim is hidden in interactive contexts.

kind.description: The model hierarchy kind of this prim.

purpose.description: The imaging purpose for this prim.

instanceable.description: Whether this prim should be treated as an instance master for instancing.

name: USDPrim
